content.full_text:
August 1, 1990

Ms. Blanca Breeze  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P. O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Breeze:

I am requesting that you send verification in writing per our conversation of July 31st, 1990 regarding conflict of interest of Clint Pridmore as President of Napa County Resource Conservation District participating as grading contractor for Jim Silva subdivision parcel split in Capell Valley.

Any new litigation or inspections that may be required for a vote through the District, I would have to abstain from voting.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

CLINTON PRIDMORE  
President
